title: alchemilla alpestris
intro: Alchemilla alpestris, also known as Alpine Lady's Mantle, is a perennial herb that belongs to the rose family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which can help to treat wounds, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Alchemilla alpestris include its ability to reduce swelling, improve circulation, and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it effective in treating conditions such as eczema, acne, and urinary tract infections. Alchemilla alpestris can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional folk remedies to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
